title: tragacantha adsurgens
intro: Tragacantha adsurgens, also known as Astragalus adsurgens, is a perennial plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha adsurgens include its ability to enhance the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and exhibit potential anti-viral and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
